creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
First tests of math/saga and graphics/qgis with proj-7.1.1 seem to work fine.

I also tested projsync with 'projsync --source-id de' and it installs the wanted files:

#ll /home/rhurlin/.local/share/proj
total 76476
-rw-r--r--  1 rhurlin  user  -    49152  2020-10-24 09:37:39  cache.db
